classifier_rules.M0: no threshold displacement or hard-gate blocked
classifier_rules.M1: threshold centroid displacement with budget/topology/nonnegative gates, but identity may fail
classifier_rules.M2: M1 plus identity gate passed and directed boundary reassignment observed, but shape may fail
classifier_rules.claim_policy: M0-M3 classifier labels evidence only; movement_claim_allowed remains false until later report policy opens it.
classifier_rules.m0_subtype_policy: M0 subtypes are derived from explicit diagnostic signals and lane/drive metadata where available; otherwise the classifier falls back to M0_no_threshold_response.
classifier_rules.validation_scope: Iteration 6 validates Iteration 4/5 movement-observable artifacts plus classifier-adversarial cases. Iteration 7 E3 pulse import is not a movement run and is validated separately.
